audit_items.proof_trace: Every pointer dereference in rpc_controller.cc targets `_impl`, a private `shared_ptr<RpcControllerImpl>` initialized to a non-null value in the constructor initializer list (L14) and replaced non-nullably in Reset() (L34). The only raw pointer passed in (`callback` at L97) is forwarded to `_impl->NotifyOnCancel()` which is a TODO stub that ignores the argument entirely — no dereference occurs. Copy/move construction is disabled via SOFA_PBRPC_DISALLOW_EVIL_CONSTRUCTORS, so no external nullification path exists.
